title: Project Manager To Coding Agent Delivery Loop
summary: Completed the first delivery-loop slice: project recommendations are durable workflow decisions, repo access is explicit and auditable, implementation runs launch through the runtime with stable ids, and branch/PR status is persisted and visible in chat and on the dashboard.
next_action: Add deeper GitHub delivery execution on top of the run spine when a dedicated coding-agent or PR opener is ready to consume the stable implementation-run ids.

verification.notes: The recommendation-decision, repo-grant, implementation-run, assistant-tool, and dashboard surfaces passed targeted tests and the repository later passed `mix precommit` on the completed stack.

resume_context.last_completed_step: Closed the workflow loop from recommendation acceptance through explicit repo access, tracked implementation runs, and persisted branch/PR status.
resume_context.notes: The first pass now has a durable run spine and explicit repo-grant boundary, so later coding-agent or GitHub-specific execution can extend the same objects instead of inventing a parallel workflow.

history.note: Created and immediately approved the follow-on spec for recommendation acceptance, repo grants, coding runs, and PR lifecycle.
Started implementation of recommendation decisions, repo grants, tracked implementation runs, and the assistant/dashboard workflow surface.
Marked the delivery-loop slice done after the run-launch, run-update, branch/PR visibility, and dashboard/chat workflows matched the canonical spec.
